title: Erratum: Prevalence of local allergic rhinitis to Dermatophagoides pteronyssinus in chronic rhinitis with negative skin prick test.
authors: Asian Pacific Journal of Allergy and Immunology
author_string: Asian Pacific Journal of Allergy and Immunology
journal_full: Asian Pacific journal of allergy and immunology
abstract: Correction to Prevalence of local allergic rhinitis to Dermatophagoides pteronyssinus in chronic rhinitis with negative skin prick test. Asian Pac J Immunol. 2019 Mar 24. doi: 10.12932/AP-170918-0408. Owing to an error, the approval protocol number were typed incorrectly. The correct is shown below: The approval protocol number (EC1) from Siriraj Institutional Review Board (SIRB) is COA no.660/2557.
